file_insights.changes: Added planTab(@ViewBuilder) method with collapsible phase sections, subtask rows, and progress tracking. Introduced @State property collapsedPhases to track UI state.
key_additions: planTab() - main view builder with progress header and per-phase sections
phaseIconInfo() - SF Symbol icon/color selection based on phase completion
planPhaseSection() - collapsible phase header with subtask rendering

patterns_discovered.usage: Set<String> tracks collapsed phase IDs; tap on phase header toggles via insert/remove
patterns_discovered.reusability: High - pattern applicable to any hierarchical collapsible list

patterns_discovered.implementation: Responsive width calculation: geo.size.width * doneCount / totalCount
patterns_discovered.colors: barEmpty background, barFill foreground, 6pt height, 3pt radius

patterns_discovered.structure: VStack(phases) → phase headers + collapsed conditional → VStack(subtasks)
patterns_discovered.indentation: 32pt left padding for subtask rows under phase headers

patterns_discovered.technique: Icon color + text color pairing matches completion state; dim colors for pending

gotchas_discovered.observation: Icon toggled directly (right/down); no rotation animation on collapse
gotchas_discovered.impact: Visual feedback is instant but lacks polish

gotchas_discovered.note: phase.id must be stable and unique; relies on AcPhase.id property
gotchas_discovered.risk: If phase IDs change during session, collapsed state becomes orphaned

approach_outcome.details: First attempt successfully implemented all requested features: overall progress bar, per-phase collapsible sections with SF Symbol icons (circle.fill/circle.lefthalf.filled/circle), subtask rows with status-specific icons (checkmark.circle.fill/arrow.triangle.2.circlepath/circle), and phase name rows with existing card row styling (black opacity background, rounded corners, overlay stroke).

recommendations.item: Extract magic numbers to named constants: padding 16/12/32/8, font sizes 14/15/13, icon sizes 18/16/12
recommendations.benefit: Improves maintainability and design system consistency

recommendations.item: Add withAnimation() to collapsedPhases toggle for smooth chevron rotation
Test with >10 phases and >20 subtasks per phase to verify scroll performance
Verify phase header background color matches existing card row style exactly (black.opacity(0.15) + white.opacity(0.05) stroke)
Add accessibility labels to SF Symbol icons and phase headers for VoiceOver
Consider collapsing phases with 0/N progress by default to reduce cognitive load
